description: Your organization requires a compliance audit of all email correspondence by sender domain. Analyze your inbox to identify the top 3 most frequently appearing sender domains. For each of these top 3 domains, create a dedicated IMAP folder named exactly 'Domain-<domainname>' and move all emails from those domains into their respective folders. Compose an email to audit-compliance@yourcompany.com with subject 'Inbox Domain Audit Report' listing each of the 3 domains, the number of emails from that domain, and a one-sentence characterization of the type of correspondence from that domain. Login: username ga, password password123.
